title: moraea angolensis
intro: Moraea angolensis, also known as the Angolan Gladiolus, is a plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Moraea angolensis are thought to include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into a decoction, infusion, or syrup, and is also used in topical applications, such as poultices and creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
